title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, a regulated financial exchange for real-world events founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, fought regulatory battles for four years before achieving a $22 billion valuation. The founders sued a government regulator and eventually scaled to millions of customers and billions in volume.
